message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "User" as User
rectangle "Backend Environment" {
  participant "Server" as Server
  participant "SuperHeroApi" as SuperHeroApi
}

alt [user search]
    User -> Server: GET /search?q=<queryValue>
    activate Server
    Server -> Server: getFromCache(queryValue) ?
    note right of Server: binarySearch(query)
    
    alt [has in cache]
        Server --> User: 200: queryValue
    else [not has in cache: request to API]
        Server -> SuperHeroApi: GET queryValue
        activate SuperHeroApi
        SuperHeroApi --> Server: 200: queryValue
        deactivate SuperHeroApi
        Server -> Server: updateCache(queryValue)
        Server --> User: 200: queryValue
    end
    
    deactivate Server
end
@enduml
```
